description:
A privacy-first cross-platform productivity workspace for notes, sketching, planning, and local AI assistance


Kivixa v0.3.12
Changed
- Implemented quick-notes reopen/edit behavior so clicking a saved note opens the same editor type (text or handwriting), allows editing, and saves updates.
- Added TranslateGemma 4B IT model to backend catalog with full metadata, verified URL, and size.
Downloads
Windows:
- Kivixa-Setup-0.3.12.exe - Windows Installer
- .msix package included (if build successful) - Modern Windows Package
Android:
- Kivixa-Android-0.3.12-arm64.apk - ARM64 (most modern devices)
- Kivixa-Android-0.3.12-armv7.apk - ARMv7 (older devices)
- Kivixa-Android-0.3.12-x86_64.apk - x86_64 (emulators)
Alternative Downloads
- F-Droid: Add our repo at https://990aa.github.io/kivixa/repo
